segments.text: To the choirmaster. A Psalm of David.
May the LORD answer you in the day of trouble! May the name of the God of Jacob protect you!
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: defend: Heb. set thee on an high place

segments.text: May he send you help from the sanctuary and give you support from Zion!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May he remember all your offerings and regard with favor your burnt sacrifices!
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: accept: Heb. turn to ashes: or, make fat

segments.text: May he grant you your heart's desire and fulfill all your plans!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May we shout for joy over your salvation, and in the name of our God set up our banners! May the LORD fulfill all your petitions!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Now I know that the LORD saves his anointed;
he will answer him from his holy heaven with the saving might of his right hand.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: his holy heaven: Heb. the heaven of his holiness
with: Heb. by the strength of the salvation of

segments.text: Some trust in chariots and some in horses,
but we trust in the name of the LORD our God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: but we rise and stand upright.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O LORD, save the king! May he answer us when we call.
segments.speaker: David
